name: Proquint
comment:
Basic usage:

    Proquint.fromInt 1234
        |> Maybe.map Proquint.toString

    Proquint.fromString "bonam-hohah"
        |> Maybe.map Proquint.toInt


# Create

@docs fromInt, fromString


# Conversion

@docs toInt, toString


# Type

values.comment: returns the int value of the proquint
